//: Root tsconfig — editor / IDE entrypoint only. The actual per-package typecheck is run by `pnpm typecheck` (turbo fan-out into apps/web/tsconfig.json and packages/shared-types/tsconfig.json). Project references are intentionally not used: apps/web has the Next.js plugin and disables `noUnusedLocals`, while shared-types is a source-only package consumed via the workspace `main` field — neither benefits from `composite: true` builds.
